channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: 2024 PPR All 51 Team
item.description: 2024 PPR All 51 Team: Each season our selection committee recognizes the best players from across the county, assembling our "All 51" team. This list includes our first team picks, and honorable mentions.
item.dc:creator: Maddy Worley, Fox 5

item.title: Florida State hires Nebraska's Tony White as defensive coordinator, AP source says
item.description: Florida State has hired Tony White to be its defensive coordinator after he developed consecutive top-20 defenses at Nebraska.
item.dc:creator: Mark Long, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: TCU, Duke climb into top 10, Notre Dame drops in women's AP Top 25; UCLA and UConn remain 1-2
item.description: TCU has grabbed its best ranking ever in The Associated Press Top 25 women's basketball poll on Monday after a convincing win over Notre Dame as the rankings got a shakeup following a holiday tournament week marked by key losses. The Horned Frogs climbed eight spots to No.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Houston's Al-Shaair apologizes for hit on Jacksonville's Lawrence that led to concussion
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Houston’s Azeez Al-Shaair took to X on Monday morning to apologize to Jacksonville’s Trevor Lawrence after his violent blow to the quarterback’s facemask led to him being carted off the field with a concussion.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ryan Poles to remain Bears general manager and lead search for new head coach
item.description: Chicago Bears president Kevin Warren said Ryan Poles will remain the general manager and serves as the point person in the search for a head coach to replace the fired Matt Eberflus.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Seligman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: College playoff bracket offers last dress rehearsal and one more chance to see where the SEC stands
item.description: For the College Football Playoff, it's one last dress rehearsal. It's also one last chance to see just how much the selection committee loves the Southeastern Conference.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Alex Ovechkin skates before Capitals practice as he works to return from a broken leg
item.description: ARLINGTON, Va. (AP) — Alex Ovechkin skated by himself before Washington Capitals practice on Monday as he works to return from a broken leg.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cubs add Matthew Boyd to rotation with $29 million, 2-year contract, AP source says
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Chicago Cubs have added Matthew Boyd to their rotation in their first big offseason move, agreeing to a $29 million, two-year contract with the veteran left-hander, according to a person familiar with the negotiations.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AP Top 25 Extra Points: No. 4 Irish still draw on lessons learned from humbling loss to N. Illinois
item.description: Now Notre Dame waits. The Fighting Irish will find out next Sunday if they'll play at home in the first round of the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports' college football winners and losers: Week 14
item.description: There were a handful of upsets during the college football weekend. But no one will be talking about that as flag fights marred the interesting slate of matchups.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Christian McCaffrey's season 'potentially' over after knee injury in 49ers' loss to Bills
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — San Francisco running back Christian McCaffrey suffered a knee injury that coach Kyle Shanahan described as “potentially” season-ending in the 49ers’ 35-10 loss to the Buffalo Bills on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mitchell scores 35, Cavs end Celtics' winning streak with 115-111 win in matchup of East's elite
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored 20 of his 35 points in the fourth quarter as the Cleveland Cavaliers ended Boston's seven-game winning streak with a 115-111 victory over the Celtics on Sunday night in the second intense matchup between the Eastern Conference’s top teams this season.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Big Ten fines Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for postgame melee
item.description: ROSEMONT, Ill. (AP) — The Big Ten Conference announced it fined Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for violating the conference's sportsmanship policy for the on-field melee at the end of the Wolverines' win in Columbus on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets' DJ Reed blasts NFL officials in explicit social media post
item.description: New York Jets defensive back D.J. Reed torches NFL officials in an explicit post on social media on Sunday after the team lost to the Seattle Seahawks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vikings win 5th straight, rallying past Cardinals 23-22 on Sam Darnold's TD pass with 1:13 left
item.description: Sam Darnold's second touchdown pass of the second half went to Jones for Minnesota's first lead with 1:13 remaining, and the Vikings rallied from 13 points down to beat the Arizona Cardinals 23-22 on Sunday for their fifth straight victory.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Texans find momentum heading into bye with 23-20 win at Jaguars after knocking out QB Lawrence
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The Houston Texans found some much-needed momentum — call it “Joe-mentum” — before their bye week.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah HC falls in overtime to Edmonton, 4-3
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Ryan Nugent-Hopkins scored at 1:18 of overtime to give the Edmonton Oilers a 4-3 win against the Utah Hockey Club at Delta Center on Friday. Nugent-Hopkins skated in on a breakaway and beat Karel Vejmelka blocker side from the right circle.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Aggies blow 17-point fourth quarter lead in loss to CSU
item.description: FORT COLLINS, Colo. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State football team could not hold a 30-13 fourth quarter lead in its season finale at Colorado State, and the Aggies end the season with a 42-37 loss to the Rams.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USU wins NIT season tip-off over North Texas, 61-57
item.description: ORLANDO (ABC4 Sports) - A career-best scoring performance from Mason Falslev helped lead Utah State men’s basketball (7-0, 0-0 MW) to a championship game title at the NIT Season Tip-Off Friday evening, as the Aggies defeated North Texas 61-57 at the ESPN Wide World of Sports Complex.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU knocks off NC State in third place game, 72-61
item.description: SAN DIEGO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU got back in the win column with a 72-61 win over NC State on Thursday afternoon at the Rady Children’s Invitational at LionTree Arena in San Diego, Calif.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Colorado Buffaloes finishes season with a win over Oklahoma State 52-0
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Colorado head coach Deion Sanders confidently told the media before the game that his team wasn’t just aiming to win but to dominate. Travis Hunter wasted no time backing up that claim.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Alabama A&M player Medrick Burnett Jr. dies following injury during game
item.description: Medrick Burnett Jr., a 20-year-old football player for Alabama A&M University, died Wednesday a month after sustaining a serious injury during a football game.
item.dc:creator: Drew Taylor, NewsNation

item.title: Chicago hosts Dallas in Central Division play
item.description: Dallas Stars (13-7, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (7-12-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Wednesday, 8:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Dallas Stars visit the Chicago Blackhawks in a matchup within the Central Division Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Rams WR Demarcus Robinson arrested on suspicion of DUI after loss to Eagles
item.description: Los Angeles Rams receiver Demarcus Robinson was arrested on suspicion of driving under the influence early Monday morning.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5
